title: Dark Theme Gui
description: dark theme gui, and diamond sword blue, planks.
body:
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d18ec9301cb940c849a34afe07e02a65e4046d54.png)
![dark theme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e345958b64b18d7f3d182d7bba9bce0a67b7e7e7_0.webp)
dark theme gui - the resource pack includes: zombie mobs dark theme (not all of it) blocks (earth, grass, planks, bamboo planks) armor tools (diamond helmet, diamond sword) the resource pack is currently available, but updates will be released soon![and more blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45363f8e6a48bd257ffbb5c1a0ae3b72f1df36bd.png)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7nCvW5vg4Cg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
